# Support

## Getting help with Advanced Repo Spine

### Documentation

Start with the project documentation:

- [README](../README.md) — project overview and quick start
- [Documentation landing page](../docs/README.md) — full documentation index
- [Product Requirements](../docs/prd/) — what ARS does and why
- [Architecture Decisions](../docs/adr/) — key design decisions and rationale

### Reporting bugs

If you have found a bug, please [open an issue](../../issues/new?template=bug_report.yml) using the bug report template. Include reproduction steps, expected behavior, and your environment details.

### Requesting features

To suggest a new feature, [open an issue](../../issues/new?template=feature_request.yml) using the feature request template. For substantial features, the project follows a PRD → RFC → ADR pipeline — see the [development cycle workflow](../docs/guides/development-cycle-workflow.md).

### Questions

For general questions about using ARS, open a blank issue with a clear title describing your question.

### Security issues

For security vulnerabilities, do **not** open a public issue. See the [security policy](SECURITY.md) for reporting instructions.
